name: 1-2-3-4 Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter until fluffy.
2. Add sugar and cream well.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt together into a separate bowl.
5. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients to the butter mixture, alternating with milk, ending with the flour.
6. Beat on low speed until smooth.
7. Add vanilla and mix in thoroughly.
8. Pour batter into greased, floured pans.
9. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
1. For the chocolate icing:
Melt butter and chocolate together in a double boiler over low heat.
2. Remove from heat and blend sugar, beaten egg, salt, and vanilla into the melted chocolate mixture.
3. Beat until the icing is creamy.
4. Use this icing to decorate three layers of cake if desired.
